textByHash.491124f9f7e87d300c374cb72b68177295ce3032: Boo hoo! Oh dear, my only daughter....
textByHash.9455f7f68fc3386b25b5702e29f64aa8914a9af5: Oh dear... my daughter, Ana, has gone missing in the desert. I fear that she is lost, or perhaps... even worse.
textByHash.dbd2712e04c80906b03c37e95c9832bfdc1e84e2: she went in there just a few days ago, she said she would be back yesterday.
textByHash.35ef79467d4bfe7b1b82f728a2531b761ea96159: Oh thank you! You've made me a very happy mother, I just hope it's not too late!
textByHash.07b600b4ea9e16e0f32effeea30a4203a00fd13f: I did go looking for her myself and I came across some footprints just a little way south. I'm worried that they lead to the desert mining camp!
textByHash.7a2cb308a3934aee8d904b2454af38a5f6dea15a: It may already have happened you thoughtless oaf! My daughter, Ana, has gone missing in the desert. I fear that she is lost, or perhaps... even worse.
textByHash.62040e373d09681c323229b719f53062476389f2: Please bring my daughter back to me. She is most likely list in the Desert somewhere. I miss her so much... Wahhhhh!
textByHash.6a33516ebc3d43ea901761e93a6d58e1aedc0a26: I did look for her myself and a little way south. I came across some footprints which may be hers. I'm worried that she may have been caught by some guards and taken to work in that terrible desert mine to the south.
textByHash.c7925232731f5f0df84f3148c9f0288d82f37368: I think she may have just gone a little way into the desert. It's unlike her to go too far away. She is an adventurous girl, but she knows how I worry. She wouldn't go too far.
textByHash.2b668e43549b1fd4cc76447b82f5852a5199e6dc: I think I saw some of her footprints to the south, you could start there. Hopefully she'll just be over a few sand dunes, but you never know. She may have been taken to that awful desert mining camp or captured by
textByHash.39d3fa1d29b5981e4a3d98aa56be52c426c9069c: Thank you very much for returning my daughter to me. I'm really very grateful... I would like to reward you for your bravery and daring.
textByHash.01a0a99f8d57baf32103653af86a1d062475795e: I can offer you increased knowledge in two of the following areas.
textByHash.0829fb9a9730c70ac24597d5f61e34b6523aeacc: Okay, now choose your second skill.
textByHash.62c9ba8b47f966257ebd6c37180b6d2ec097f893: Okay, that's all the skills I can teach you!
textByHash.bbbcbd4369cfa3e01f1a2b89f6764cdec19d321b: Thanks for returning Anna to me, I think she has something else to say to you though!
textByHash.ac95880c27c0303e15c29a404a9ecaa78c11c1f2: Thank you very much for returning my daughter to me. I'm really very grateful... I would like to reward you for your bravery and daring. I can offer you increased knowledge in two of the following areas.
textByHash.051766ab28140cb047424e67b283d61a18cc2021: Thank you very much for returning my daughter to me. I'm really very grateful... I would like to reward you for your bravery and daring. I can offer you increased knowledge in one of the following areas.
textByHash.c15ebd7432ab210f689f9e88eb1da1373ed83428: Thanks so much for returning my daughter to me. I expect that she will go on another trip soon though. She is the adventurous type... a bit like yourself really! Okay, see you around then!
